positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric representation of a nocturnal owl perched on a crescent moon silhouette. The artwork should feature deep indigo and midnight blue gradients contrasted sharply with glowing, ethereal pale golds and celestial turquoise accents. Use clean, Art Deco-inspired linework with repeating, interconnected geometric patterns resembling constellations and stylized feather motifs. The composition must be centered, with the owl and moon forming a perfect focal point. High contrast, limited color palette, ideal for screen printing on black fabric. Vector illustration quality, minimalist modern design, centered composition, radial symmetry.
